description: Risk check records — 5-layer risk management decision audit trail
riskLayers: L1: Position sizing (max 5% portfolio per trade)
L2: Daily loss limit (3% daily → auto stop)
L3: Total drawdown limit (10% → emergency close all)
L4: Consecutive loss pause (5 losses → pause, 3 losses → 50% size)
L5: Regime filter (EMA convergence → block all trades)
L6: Human-in-the-loop override (manual operator intervention for capital preservation)

L5_regimeFilter.note: Ranging — longs allowed with wider SL (1.5x ATR), 75% sizing
EMA convergence detected — ALL trading BLOCKED

records.rejectReason: L5 regime filter: EMA convergence blocks all entries

L2_dailyLoss.note: Daily loss exceeded 3% — AUTO STOP triggered

records.action: All open positions closed at market. Trading paused for remainder of day.
records.recoveryNote: Trading resumed next day after daily reset. Consecutive loss counter carried forward.

records.rejectReason: BTC/USDT long blacklisted (OOS win rate 40%). Pair-level block overrides all layers.

L2_dailyLoss.note: New day — daily counter reset at midnight UTC

L4_consecutiveLoss.note: Loss streak reset after profitable day

L5_regimeFilter.note: BB Squeeze breakout regime — full sizing allowed

L1_positionSize.note: MAX CONCURRENT POSITIONS REACHED — 5/5 slots filled

records.rejectReason: L1 position limit: 5/5 concurrent positions filled. Signal queued for next available slot.

L1_positionSize.note: Position sized at 2.50% — reduced by HIGH_VOLATILITY regime (50% scale)

L4_consecutiveLoss.note: Clean streak — but regime forces 50% scale anyway

L5_regimeFilter.note: BB width 2.05x normal — HIGH_VOLATILITY. Longs allowed but 50% sizing + 1.8x ATR SL

records.scaleReason: High volatility regime → 50% sizing + wider SL. N2 counter-trend combo overrides DOGE long degradation.

L1_positionSize.note: Position sized at max 5% — triple confluence signal warrants full allocation

L2_dailyLoss.note: First trade of the day — clean slate

L5_regimeFilter.note: Trending up regime — full long strategies enabled

L1_positionSize.note: Position sized at 4.99% — within 5% limit. Balance includes ETH realized PnL.

L2_dailyLoss.note: Net positive daily PnL from ETH trade — no daily limit concern

L3_totalDrawdown.note: New peak equity after ETH profit

L4_consecutiveLoss.note: Last trade was a winner — counter at zero

L5_regimeFilter.note: Trending up — MACD divergence strategy active

records.liveResult: TP1 hit — SL moved to breakeven. Trade now risk-free, targeting TP2/TP3.

L3_totalDrawdown.note: Total drawdown 0.1% — far from 10% emergency limit

L4_consecutiveLoss.note: Only 1 consecutive loss — no scaling needed

L5_regimeFilter.note: MACD divergence valid in trending down regime

records.note: All 5 risk layers passed. Position sized at maximum 5% allocation.

L2_dailyLoss.note: Daily PnL positive — no daily stop concern

L5_regimeFilter.note: Ranging regime — short allowed with adjusted sizing

L2_dailyLoss.note: Daily PnL near zero — room for trading

L5_regimeFilter.warning: Counter-trend short in uptrend — elevated risk
L5_regimeFilter.note: Regime filter passed but AI flagged for review

aiOverride.reasoning: MiniMax M2.7 identified strong uptrend (ADX 53.6) adversely positioned against short — recommended immediate exit after 42min
aiOverride.result: Position closed at -$9.19 loss (prevented potential -$99.6 max loss at SL)

records.note: Risk layers all passed at entry, but AI position review correctly identified deteriorating conditions and overrode hold decision. Demonstrates 6th risk layer: AI real-time oversight.

L6_humanOverride.reasoning: Pattern of counter-trend short losses identified. Human operator exercised override authority to prevent further drawdown.
L6_humanOverride.note: 6th risk layer: Human-in-the-loop override for capital preservation

records.note: Human override demonstrates trust-minimized but human-supervised trading. Operator identified systemic issue (counter-trend shorts in uptrend) that strategy parameters hadn't yet adapted to.
